positions.label: Crossed the Volga into the burning city (Rodimtsev)

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

notes: Converted from the 87th Rifle Division. Famous for the 14–15 Sep crossing and the central landing stage. Pilot: city positions schematic (west-bank strip); the division held a narrow riverside sector inside the drawn pocket ring, so side checks report it as contested.
